title: Bostik Tape Discs Translucent - 120 Discs - Easy Way to Wrap Presents - Made of Paper - Eco-Friendly - Recyclable - UKCA and CE approved
features: Translucent, Easy Peel, Single Sided 25mm Paper Sticky Circles
The Scissors-Free Alternative to Tape, No Mess and Easy to Use
Ideal For Wrapping Presents, Fixing Ribbons and Tags, Sealing Envelopes and More
Sticky Paper Discs That You Can Even Write On
description: From the manufacturer Bostik Tape Discs The scissors-free alternative to tape Forget scissors, Bostik Tape Discs are easier to use and more convenient than sticky tape on a roll. They’re the neat way to wrap gifts and parcels, fix ribbons and tags, seal bags, envelopes and much more. You can even write on them. These handy 25mm translucent paper discs are acid and lignin-free, and they're recyclable too! Suitable uses The easy, 'no scissors' way of wrapping presents, attaching ribbons and tags, and sealing bags and envelopes – no more struggling to find the end of the sticky tape. Advantages at a glance Bostik Tape Discs Translucent sticky circles of tape Recyclable The easy way to wrap presents and seal bags Can be written on UKCA and CE approved 120 discs Bostik Glu Dots –
